empty.hint: Select text, then press Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+C or right-click to review it. KogCat keeps only a few points worth handling.

setup.banner: Set up a model provider to refine reviews — add your API key and base URL, then pick a model.

loading.title: Reviewing “{{label}}”…
loading.refine: Turning it into a few suggestions
loading.shape: Preparing a clear way to handle it

errors.engineNotReady: KogCat engine is not ready yet. Try again in a moment.
errors.noResponse: Review failed: engine did not respond.

result.noStrongPoints: No sufficiently relevant calibration points this time. KogCat will not pad the panel with weak matches.

notice.reconnected: Engine connected — try the review again.

preview.refineFailed: Only strong local signals are shown this time; weak matches are hidden.
preview.noModel: Connect a model and KogCat will organize local evidence into fewer, clearer suggestions.
